case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_call.reasoning: Validate checkoutservice logs in 150-180s window to confirm latency impact continuity

tool_observations.observation:

reasoner.analysis: Checked 150-180s checkoutservice traces. Latency.p99/self_p99 spikes (dev=+2.4/+1.6) confirm internal propagation delays. Metrics show normal workload/cpu. Retains checkoutservice_latency as top cause.
Checkoutservice latency spikes (dev=+2.4) drive propagation delays. Currencyservice latency and checkoutservice mem anomalies follow. Root cause prioritized by metric-led evidence.
